escalation.rationale: 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire holds while Iran reopens Strait of Hormuz conditionally as 40-nation talks convene on post-conflict security arrangements.

ticker_items: Israel-Lebanon 10-day ceasefire takes effect with Lebanese warnings of violations
Iran declares Strait of Hormuz 'completely open' to commercial vessels
Macron-Starmer lead 40-nation summit on Hormuz security mission planning
Ukraine claims first autonomous robotic capture of enemy position
Trump threatens to 'start dropping bombs again' without Iran deal

ukraine.text: Ukrainian unmanned systems had conducted the first capture of an enemy position without human infantry
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelensky
ukraine.title: President

middle_east.text: Iran announced that the strait is open and ready for full passage
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: The US will have to start dropping bombs again if no US-Iran deal is reached
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: President Macron co-chairs 40-nation summit with UK to plan multinational Hormuz security mission. France leads diplomatic efforts to restore commercial navigation post-conflict while backing Germany's diplomatic push on Hormuz reopening.

Prime Minister Starmer partners with France to coordinate international response on Strait of Hormuz security arrangements. UK leads efforts to establish post-conflict multinational force for freedom of navigation through vital oil shipping lane.

Chinese Foreign Ministry denies reports that Iran used Chinese-built spy satellites to target US military bases during Operation Epic Fury. China's position remains pivotal in Myanmar civil war outcome as anti-junta forces potentially gain upper hand.

IAEA chief warns of rapid increase in North Korea's nuclear weapons manufacturing capabilities at Yongbyon reactor. Ukrainian analysis reveals North Korean ballistic missiles used against Ukraine were manufactured using outdated 50-year-old methods with cheaper components.

financial.notes: US Treasury ends sanctions waiver for Iranian oil sales stranded at sea, tightening economic pressure amid blockade.

update_log.text: Trump threatens renewed bombing campaign if Iran negotiations fail to produce agreement
Iran declares Strait of Hormuz completely open to commercial vessels with conditions
40-nation summit convenes under Franco-British leadership to plan Hormuz security mission
Israel-Lebanon 10-day ceasefire holds despite Lebanese army warnings of violations
Ukrainian forces claim first autonomous robotic capture of enemy position without infantry
